entities.name: The 20% Interval
entities.context: Training protocol comprising 20% of V's workout structure, focused on high-intensity interval work

entities.name: VO2 Max
entities.context: Cardiovascular fitness metric targeted by the 20% Interval protocol

entities.name: 4x4 Protocol
entities.context: Specific interval structure: 4 minutes hard effort followed by 3 minutes easy recovery, repeated 4 times

entities.name: Race-Pace Comfort
entities.context: Training goal of building comfort at race-level intensity

entities.name: Power Development
entities.context: One of the three purposes of the 20% Interval alongside VO2 Max and race-pace comfort

relationships.context: Primary physiological target of the 20% Interval protocol
The 20% Interval is executed via the 4x4 protocol (4 min hard / 3 min easy)
One of the stated purposes of this interval tier
Power output improvement is a stated goal of this interval tier
The 4x4 structure drives heart rate to 151+ BPM, targeting VO2 Max adaptation
